core_mechanism: an effective-action (coarse-grained) parameterization in which unresolved microscopic degrees of freedom are integrated out into a small set of effective coupling parameters, whose values are then inferred and discriminated by applying a controlled background perturbation and measuring the response of a weak probe
brief_reason: The abstract centers on 'low-energy effective actions which parameterize the interaction' of unknown candidates with an external field, using an applied strong field plus an optical probe to both detect the couplings and distinguish between underlying microscopic scenarios.
